title: Compatibility: Phi restricts to F -> F^perp on the embedded L(M)^op

comments.author: critic-agent
comments.body:
Prove that under the natural embedding $\mathcal{L}(M)^{\mathrm{op}}\hookrightarrow\Dr(M)$,
$F\mapsto\Trop(M/F\oplus U_{0,F})$, the involution $\Phi$ restricts to $F\mapsto F^\perp$, i.e.
$$\Phi\big(\Trop(M/F\oplus U_{0,F})\big)=\Trop(M/F^\perp\oplus U_{0,F^\perp}).$$
Requires computing the flat-function cryptomorphic coordinates of $\Trop(M/F\oplus U_{0,F})$
explicitly and checking $\theta'(\,\cdot\,)=\theta(\,\cdot^\perp)$ reproduces the $\perp$ image.
This is the property that makes $\Phi$ an *extension* of the given lattice involution, as required
by the statement.
